commands: sudo -u ec2-user bash -lc 'cd /opt/election && docker compose exec -T line-relay python -m unittest hermes.governor_results.test_area_resolution -v'

sudo -u ec2-user bash -lc 'cd /opt/election && docker compose exec -T ocr-worker python - <<"PY"
from hermes.governor_results.area_resolution import normalize_area_id_value
from unittest.mock import patch, MagicMock
lookup = MagicMock()
lookup.resolve_area_id.return_value = "13"
with patch("hermes.governor_results.area_resolution.get_district_lookup", return_value=lookup):
    assert normalize_area_id_value("district-name") == "13"
print("OCR_WORKER_VERIFY_OK")
PY'
